name: Lent — Return to the Lord
description: Forty days of repentance, fasting, and honest self-examination. Echoes the Daily Examen and prepares the heart for the joy of Easter.

prayers.title: Ash Wednesday — Remember you are dust
prayers.description: Begin Lent with Psalm 90:12 — 'So teach us to number our days, that we may apply our hearts unto wisdom.' Ask God to give you a tender, truthful heart for this season.

prayers.title: Pray Psalm 51 — Create in me a clean heart
prayers.description: Pray David's great psalm of repentance slowly, line by line. Name what you need God to wash, restore, and renew.

prayers.title: Examen — What am I clinging to?
prayers.description: Ask the Holy Spirit to show you the one thing you are most reluctant to release this Lent. Bring it honestly before God.

prayers.title: Prayer for the fast
prayers.description: If you are fasting this Lent — from food, media, or a comfort — dedicate it to the Lord. Ask Him to meet you in the empty place.

prayers.title: Pray for the hungry
prayers.description: Lent turns fasting outward. Pray for those who are hungry not by choice, and ask God how your fast might feed someone else.

prayers.title: Jesus in the wilderness
prayers.description: Meditate on Matthew 4:1-11. Where are you being tested? Ask Jesus to give you His words of Scripture in your own wilderness.

prayers.title: Kyrie eleison — Lord, have mercy
prayers.description: Pray the ancient cry slowly: Lord, have mercy. Christ, have mercy. Lord, have mercy. Let it carry what you cannot put into words.

prayers.title: A prayer for humility
prayers.description: Read Philippians 2:5-11. Ask God to form in you the mind of Christ — the same humble, self-giving love.

prayers.title: Prayer for an enemy
prayers.description: Bring before God someone who has hurt you. Ask Him, as Jesus did from the cross, to teach you to forgive.

prayers.title: The prayer of the tax collector
prayers.description: Pray Luke 18:13 over and over: 'God be merciful to me a sinner.' Do not hurry past it.

prayers.title: Pruned to bear more fruit
prayers.description: Read John 15:1-8. Ask God what He is pruning in you — and thank Him that pruning is a sign of His tender care, not His displeasure.

prayers.title: Prayer for the Church in suffering
prayers.description: Lent joins the cross of Christ with the ongoing cross of His body. Pray for believers in persecuted regions this day.

prayers.title: Longing for Easter
prayers.description: Without denying the weight of Lent, lift your eyes to the resurrection that is coming. Ask God for hope to sustain you through the season.
